steps.description: Rust integration test for Lock flow
steps.command: cd src/api/api && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --test sequence_e2e_test seq1_lock -- --nocapture
steps.expected: Test exits with code 0; stdout confirms lock_id issued, SR_0 computed via SHA3-256("QS_LOCK_V1"||...), and lockWithSR0 transaction submitted to L1 Vault at 0x6F889C00a5e674ab0b9403AfBa0fBEbe30511c67 on Sepolia

steps.description: Playwright integration spec for Consumer Lock
steps.command: cd src/frontend/web && npx playwright test e2e/integration/lock.integration.spec.ts --reporter=json
steps.expected: All Playwright tests in lock.integration.spec.ts pass (status: passed); reporter JSON shows zero failed tests; UI lock creation reaches a success state and the corresponding DB row is present

steps.description: Verify lock row was created during this run window and pk_dilithium populated
steps.command: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id, status, length(pk_dilithium) FROM locks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
steps.expected: Exactly one row is returned; status is 'locked'; pk_dilithium length is exactly 1952 bytes (Dilithium public key size)

steps.description: Verify totalLocked increased on Sepolia Vault
steps.expected: Returned uint256 value is strictly greater than 0 wei, confirming at least one Deposit was accepted by the L1 Vault and the Locked event was emitted

acceptance_criteria: Backend integration test exits code 0 with stdout confirming SR_0 computation and L1 submission — no fallback or mock path taken
Playwright lock.integration.spec.ts reports zero failed tests and the UI reaches a success/confirmed lock state
A locks row exists with created_at within the last 5 minutes, status='locked', and pk_dilithium length=1952
Sepolia Vault totalLocked() returns a value strictly greater than 0 wei
No silent fallback or hardcoded non-spec address appears anywhere in the captured trace
